# Research Paper Writing
## When to Use
Use when the user asks to draft, revise, expand, or polish an academic ML/AI paper section using local references, experiments, or bibliography files.
## Do Not Use When
Do not use only to verify whether a paper is real, download a paper, or repair a DOCX reference list format report.
## Required Inputs
Draft manuscript, research plan, local PDF library, bibliography, or experiment results.
## Workflow
1. Inspect local references and project notes.
2. Plan paper structure and citation coverage.
3. Draft conservative academic text with methods and experiments.
4. Update references and verify claims.
